guards: Escalate rather than guess when changed paths are missing or too broad.
Use either --task or --task-file for task-intent carry-forward, not both.
Broad external-work ingestion must route to active planning or narrow to one explicit issue before implementation.
Tiny output must preserve the next action, changed-path inspect scope, blocking warnings, and selected proof commands.
Prefer --select for exact field drill-down and --verbose only for broad diagnostics.

steps.description: Execute the operation through the generated TypeScript domain operation table.

ir_plan.summary: Generated TypeScript native runtime binding for a command whose source operation has not yet been decomposed into portable IR.

proof: implementer context sample validates against implementer_context.schema.json
broad external-work task text receives a planning route when no active planning record exists
implement tiny profile omits diagnostic/provenance fields while preserving next-decision data
implement selectors return exact fields from the implementer context

reads.surface: verbose flag for broad diagnostic output
field selector for exact JSON drill-down

steps.description: Build inspect scope, boundary warnings, proof commands, task routing guardrails, and handoff requirements.
Select verbose implementer context or default next-decision output.
Return only requested JSON fields when --select is provided.
Emit implementer context in the requested format.

summary: Return a cheap-implementer context for a bounded changed-path scope.
